name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a quick note before the day fills up. Yesterday brought a few new faces our way and some familiar ones back on the books — nothing that needs your attention right this minute, but worth a glance when you have a coffee in hand.

Everything's running smoothly on our end. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting for you in the dashboard.

Take it easy out there,
— Bright Smile Dental
